# SenZon™ — AI Operator & Business Coach

SenZon™ is a European AI business based in Italy, run by Alexander — a solo AI Operator and Business Coach serving non-technical founders and SMBs across Europe. SenZon™ is not an agency, freelancer, or course. It is a single embedded AI-native specialist who designs, builds, and deploys AI-powered systems end to end, with full accountability.

Tagline: Think. Build. Automate.

## Core Offer

### 90-Day AI Officer Retainer (Primary Offer)
Strategy, accountability, and full AI integration for your business in 90 days.
Maximum 4 clients at any time. 3-month minimum commitment.

- Retainer — 1 Client Slot: Monthly 90-min AI strategy session, weekly 30-min accountability check-in, full AI tools roadmap, SEO and digital presence audit, async voice message access, SenZon™ builds available as add-on. €2,000/month.
- Retainer + Build Bundle: Everything above plus one Digital Presence or Systems build included. €3,500/month.

## Additional Services

### Product Build
From idea to live revenue-generating product in 14 days. SaaS, PWA, or MVP.
- Starter (landing page + core feature + deployment): €2,500
- Full Build (complete MVP + payments + auth + custom domain): €4,500
- Premium (full product + marketing funnel + automations): €8,500

### Digital Presence
Brand, website, SEO, and content system for local businesses and SMEs.
- Essential (logo + website + social setup): €1,500
- Full Presence (brand + website + PWA + SEO + content system): €3,200
- Done & Running (everything + 30 days managed content): €5,200

### Systems & Strategy
AI operating system design for operators who want to work smarter.
- Clarity Session (90-min strategy call + written action plan): €450
- AI Operator Kit (master doc + prompt library + workflow map): €850
- Full System (complete AI operating system): €2,000

## Add-Ons
Domain Acquisition & Setup: €200
Social Media Management: €600/month
Monetisation Audit: €500
Growth Strategy Session: €450
Email Marketing Setup: €900
Competitor & Market Research: €600

## Live Products
- PostMio™ — Social media and review management SaaS for local businesses. Live at postmio.com.
- Dr. Thorne: Phantom Sector™ — Browser-based AI-native PWA escape game. Live at phantomsector.com.
